name: Green Beans Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green beans in salted water (using 1/2 teaspoon salt) in a covered pot until crisp tender.
2. Drain the green beans.
3. In a skillet, sauté sliced mushrooms in 2 tablespoons butter.
4. Add the mushrooms and green beans together using a slotted spoon.
5. Add another 3 tablespoons of butter and heavy cream to the beans and cook uncovered on low heat until absorbed.
6. In a small bowl, beat egg, add nutmeg, lemon juice, and grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Stir in the ham into the green beans and mushrooms, heating through.
8. Mix in the egg mixture and remove from heat.
6 servings
SOURCE: 1979 New Orleans Times-Picayune Recipe Contest Cookbook
